Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer

Class PredicateTransformers

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.PredicateTransformers
public class PredicateTransformers extends Object
Common protocol for transforming predicates.
Since:
2.4

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static IFormulaRewriter2
    makeSimplifier(SimpleSequents.SimplificationOption... options)
    Returns a formula rewriter that can be used to simplify logically a predicate in a sound manner: The predicate obtained after rewriting is equivalent to the original predicate.

  • Method Details

    • makeSimplifier

      public static IFormulaRewriter2 makeSimplifier(SimpleSequents.SimplificationOption... options)
      Returns a formula rewriter that can be used to simplify logically a predicate in a sound manner: The predicate obtained after rewriting is equivalent to the original predicate.

      The rewriter performs its rewriting by applying repeatedly the following rules until reaching a fix-point:

      • SIMP_SPECIAL_AND_BTRUE
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_AND_BFALSE
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_OR_BTRUE
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_OR_BFALSE
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_IMP_BTRUE_R
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_IMP_BTRUE_L
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_IMP_BFALSE_R
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_IMP_BFALSE_L
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_NOT_BTRUE
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_NOT_BFALSE
      • SIMP_NOT_NOT
      • SIMP_MULTI_EQV
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_EQV_BTRUE
      • SIMP_SPECIAL_EQV_BFALSE
      • SIMP_FORALL
      • SIMP_EXISTS
      • SIMP_LIT_MINUS
      Note: The last rule is present only for technical reason.

      Options can be passed to also apply some additional simplification rules.

      Parameters:
      options - simplification options
      Returns:
      a simplified sequent equivalent to the given one
      Since:
      3.0
